nodes.label: Monotheism And Gods Nature
nodes.description: God's nature, attributes, oneness, and sovereignty

nodes.label: Prophecy And Revelation
nodes.description: Prophetic mission, revelation, scripture, and divine communication

nodes.label: Moral Law And Ethics
nodes.description: Moral principles, ethical conduct, and commandments

nodes.label: Worship And Ritual
nodes.description: Acts of worship, prayer, fasting, pilgrimage, and ritual practice

nodes.label: Afterlife And Judgment
nodes.description: Day of Judgment, paradise, hell, resurrection, and accountability

nodes.label: Creation And Cosmology
nodes.description: Creation of universe, humans, nature, and natural phenomena

nodes.label: Prophetic Narratives
nodes.description: Stories of prophets and historical narratives

nodes.label: Social Law
nodes.description: Family law, marriage, divorce, inheritance, and social contracts

nodes.label: Covenant And Obedience
nodes.description: Divine covenant, faith, obedience, and disbelief

nodes.label: Divine Mercy And Forgiveness
nodes.description: God's mercy, forgiveness, repentance, and redemption

nodes.label: Warfare And Struggle
nodes.description: Armed struggle, persecution, migration, and defense

nodes.label: Knowledge And Wisdom
nodes.description: Pursuit of knowledge, wisdom, reflection, and understanding

nodes.label: Mathematical Miracle
nodes.description: Khalifa's mathematical miracle of 19 and Quranic numerology
